criteria.name: Progress State Clarity
criteria.description: Is it clear what's in production, in-progress, planned, and discussed?

criteria.name: Short-Term Priorities Coherence
criteria.description: Are the top 3 initiatives for next 3 months clearly defined and coherent?

criteria.name: Medium/Long-Term Vision Alignment
criteria.description: Do 6-12 month and 1-2 year priorities align with stated vision?

criteria.name: Critical Dependencies ID
criteria.description: Are all critical internal and external dependencies identified?

criteria.name: Continuity Plans for Dependencies
criteria.description: For each critical non-mastered dependency, is there a documented plan B?

criteria.name: Risk Mapping Exhaustiveness
criteria.description: Are the top 5-8 risks identified and prioritized by probability × impact?

criteria.name: Mitigation Quality & Ownership
criteria.description: For each high-risk item, is there a clear mitigation plan with an owner and deadline?

criteria.name: Resource Availability
criteria.description: Are human and budget resources sufficient to execute the roadmap?
